title: HPKE AAD recipient_pub_id binding prevents replay to different recipient
description: hpke.rs:22-50: recipient_pub_id is bound into the AEAD AAD on both seal and unseal. This means a ciphertext sealed for Alice cannot be decrypted by Bob even if Bob obtains Alice's secret key — the AAD mismatch causes the AEAD verify to fail. A contributor might suggest removing the AAD to simplify the API (it's not strictly required for confidentiality), but it closes an important attack: a relay operator who obtains a user's HPKE secret cannot redirect sealed messages addressed to that user to themselves. Keep the AAD binding.
